MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2020 Dismissal - No Appearance

Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And Of Non Appearance
Off Calendar Mar-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LORENA FAGAN's Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And Of Non Appearance.

Defendant/Propounding Party's motion is granted. Plaintiff/Responding Party did not file any opposition. Defendant's only set of Request for Admissions to Plaintiff shall be deemed admitted.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling, approved as to form directy by email to the Judge Pro Tem at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. SYLVIA VELEZ (Tel: 916-563-7363) appearing as the moving party and as attorney-of-record for plaintiff Alba I. Aguilera-Rios;
Plaintiff ALBA I. AGUILERA-RIOS present;
Atty. THOMAS A. GOODWIN, ESQ. of Law Firm of Brian P. Smith & Associates (Tel: 408-878-0021) appearing for defendant Lorena Faith Ann Fagan.

HEARING RE: ATTORNEY-OF-RECORD SYLVIA VELEZ'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF ALBA AGUILERA-RIOS.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. Matter is discussed by the Court and the parties. The plaintiff states that she does not oppose Ms. Velez's motion. Matter submitted. The Court rules as follows: Attorney-of-Record Sylvia Velez's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Plaintiff Alba Aguilera-Rios is granted.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
